name: Seas the Opportunity
description: It seems some of Starfleet's finest can't catch a break, as attempts at shore leave are quickly foiled by disappearances, disputes, and all manner of disturbances. Help these officers get some much needed rest.
rules:
-- There are two Phases to this Event! Each Phase is individually timed.
-- In this Hybrid Event, you will complete Supply Missions in one phase, and Faction Missions in another phase.
-- Unique Federation, Ferengi Alliance, and Maquis Faction Missions are available during the event. Open the Event to access them.
-- Using Beach Day Spock, any version of Ajur, Sisko, B. Ortegas, or Casual crew will provide a bonus to Faction Missions and Supply Missions.
-- Every Faction or Supply Mission you complete earns you Event Victory Points. Collect Event Victory Points to unlock Threshold Rewards!
-- Community Rewards are also available during Phase 1 only. Collect Event Victory Points to unlock these rewards before the phase change!
-- In this event, Squadrons may also compete to advance up the Squadron leaderboards. Join a Squadron to get more rewards!
bonus_text: Crew Bonus: Beach Day Spock, Ajur, Sisko, B. Ortegas, Casual
rewards_teaser: Reach Rank 1 by gaining Victory Points from Event Missions!

featured_crew.name: Picard
featured_crew.flavor: Picard plans to take good care of his health and rest. But Vash shows up, and his plans are ruined.

action.name: All I Require Is To Sit In The Sun And Read My Book. Alone.

featured_crew.name: Sisko
featured_crew.flavor: Sisko explains his existence to the aliens, showing various episodes from his life. One of them is his meeting with Jennifer on the beach.

action.name: This Is Gilgo Beach, Where We Met

featured_crew.name: Beto
featured_crew.flavor: Erica Ortegas' brother is a film director and he comes to the Enterprise to film the centennial Federation Day.

rewards.name: Dilithium
rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Picard
rewards.flavor: Picard plans to take good care of his health and rest. But Vash shows up, and his plans are ruined.

action.name: All I Require Is To Sit In The Sun And Read My Book. Alone.

rewards.name: Beto
rewards.flavor: Erica Ortegas' brother is a film director and he comes to the Enterprise to film the centennial Federation Day.

rewards.name: Rarity
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 5 Polestars: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super rare, Legendary

rewards.name: Skill
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 6 Polestars: Command, Diplomacy, Security, Engineering, Science, Medicine

adventures.name: Kernel of Possibility
adventures.description: Investigate objects which may become rare in the future.

adventures.name: A Complete View
adventures.description: Interview witnesses and compare their stories.

adventures.name: Temporal Agents
adventures.description: Get the details on the Vorgon from Daniels.

adventures.name: A Truth Out of Time
adventures.description: Ascertain the truth of the string of incidents.

rewards.name: Seas the Opportunity
rewards.flavor: Event Victory Points

rewards.name: Beto
rewards.flavor: Erica Ortegas' brother is a film director and he comes to the Enterprise to film the centennial Federation Day.

rewards.name: Sisko
rewards.flavor: Sisko explains his existence to the aliens, showing various episodes from his life. One of them is his meeting with Jennifer on the beach.

action.name: This Is Gilgo Beach, Where We Met

rewards.name: 10x Portal
rewards.flavor: 10 valuable items. Go to Time Portal to collect!

screens.text: "Captain, I regret to inform you that I will be unable to assist you for the foreseeable future. Doctor McCoy has insisted I take at least ten of the hundreds of shore leave days I have accrued. I do not see the point, but he insists I need a break."
"You need a break, Spock, and I need a break from you and your Vulcan shenanigans. Come on, now, it'll be good for you. And Risa's the perfect place for it."

"Risa may not be the most relaxing vacation destination right now, unfortunately. Multiple Starfleet officers have disappeared here. Multiple thefts reported. I've been trying to help with the investigation, and it's just become more work, so maybe you should--"

"I would be happy to assist, Commander. I'll begin analyzing any evidence immediately. Captain, could you assist with the investigation as well? It seems there will be something worthwhile to do on this shore leave after all."

"Captain, I regret to inform you that I will be unable to assist you for the foreseeable future. Doctor McCoy has insisted I take at least ten of the hundreds of shore leave days I have accrued. I do not see the point, but he insists I need a break."
"You need a break, Spock, and I need a break from you and your Vulcan shenanigans. Come on, now, it'll be good for you. And Risa's the perfect place for it."

"Risa may not be the most relaxing vacation destination right now, unfortunately. Multiple Starfleet officers have disappeared here. Multiple thefts reported. I've been trying to help with the investigation, and it's just become more work, so maybe you should--"

"I would be happy to assist, Commander. I'll begin analyzing any evidence immediately. Captain, could you assist with the investigation as well? It seems there will be something worthwhile to do on this shore leave after all."
